change_summary: Adds final catalog-review cases for immutable Recipe Revision, exact local/remote readiness and Run locality, produced-output records, Secret Access expiry/cleanup and transparency privacy/offline semantics.

cases.setup: Importer writes accepted_for_execution or mutable acceptance state into the immutable Recipe Revision.

One Node-local Build binds exact Recipe Acceptance, Backend Compatibility, Compiled Plan, Workspace Materialization generation, Provider generation/epoch, Node generation, current Node capability/resource snapshots and Dispatch Eligibility.
An approved remote Build Provider binds remote-service authority, Provider generation/epoch, capability evidence and Dispatch Eligibility without Node fields.
assertions: no Node or Node snapshot fields

cases.setup: Build readiness mixes Node and remote-service fields or references a Provider/Materialization generation different from the Run.
A Build Output Record is created in declared state without Content, Object Revision, digest or producer Attempt evidence.
assertions: Output Record requires produced bytes and exact producer Attempt

cases.setup: Secret grant expires after access absence, revocation/cleanup and required leak checks are verified.
System marks Secret Access expired without verified cleanup and later transitions the terminal record to cleanup_failed.
assertions: cleanup failure must be recorded directly from active/revoking

cases.setup: Public transparency-log evidence is recorded without an explicit signer-identity disclosure acknowledgement.
Trust Policy permits offline verification using exact subject, signature bundle and trusted roots with transparency_mode=offline_no_log.
assertions: no log service or entry fabricated
